title: cyclosorus aquatilis
intro: Cyclosorus aquatilis, also known as the water fern or water spleenwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Blechnaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus aquatilis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin infections, among others. It can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for herbal remedies, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
